summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Elyn MusicMasking application after theme and name changes. Backend APIs are fully functional (11/11 tests passed including new AI masking endpoint). Frontend shows excellent functionality with successful theme transition to light violet/blue colors. Export dialog overlay issue persists from previous iteration.

ui_bugs.issue: Export button click still blocked by Emergent badge overlay element - same issue as previous iteration
ui_bugs.workaround: Emergent badge overlay intercepts pointer events preventing export dialog from opening

passed_tests: Backend: All 11 API endpoints working including new /api/mask endpoint (root, list tracks, upload, get track, analyze, restructure, mask, list projects, get project, export, serve audio)
Frontend: App loads with light violet/blue theme and 'Elyn MusicMasking' header
Frontend: Header shows gradient text 'Elyn MusicMasking' and subtitle 'Audio Masking & Restructure'
Frontend: Upload zone visible and accepts audio files
Frontend: Track list shows 4 tracks with analyzed badges
Frontend: Track selection displays waveform visualization with colored sections
Frontend: Analyze Structure button detects 5 sections with colored blocks
Frontend: Three tabs visible: Restructure, Collage, AI Masking
Frontend: AI Masking tab shows TikTok AI Masking panel with intensity slider
Frontend: AI Masking panel has 5 technique toggles (pitch_shift, speed_change, eq_modify, reverb, noise)
Frontend: Apply AI Masking button creates masked projects successfully
Frontend: Apply Restructure creates restructured projects successfully
Frontend: Collage functionality works - can add sections and create collages
Frontend: Play/Pause button works for audio playback
Frontend: Projects created and listed in sidebar (10 projects found)
Frontend: Waveform shows colored sections after analysis with proper section labels
Frontend: Section editor shows draggable colored blocks with timing information

success_percentage.backend: 100% (11/11 API endpoints working including new AI masking)
success_percentage.frontend: 94% (16/17 features working, 1 export dialog overlay issue)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix export dialog overlay issue - Emergent badge is still blocking export button clicks. This is the same issue from previous iteration that needs to be resolved by adjusting z-index or positioning of overlay elements.
